description: Create three game design documents for 'Quest Accepted: Unfortunately' in docs/ directory
steps: Create docs/ directory at project root

Create docs/GAME_CONCEPT_LOCK.md with: Title, Elevator Pitch, Ton, Kernmechanik (Questbook reacts to BarkEvents not audio), Party (Nib, Brugg, Vellum), Questbook-Logik (bureaucratic misinterpretation), Quest Pressure (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH), Kernbotschaft, Was NICHT gebaut wird. Max 1200 words. No new chapters, no new mechanics, no open-world, no audio recognition. Barks are internal events BarkEvent.X.

Create docs/VERTICAL_SLICE.md with: Buildable 10-15 minute demo covering Prolog + Chapter 1. Sections: 1) Taverne The Limping Cockatrice, 2) Fall in Kanalisation, 3) Sewers of Bad Decisions, 4) Mini-Dungeon, 5) Boss The Rat Accountant, 6) First Questbook page find, 7) Return/conclusion moment. Include: exact play sequence, required maps, NPCs, enemies, items, barks, UI states, questbook reactions, boss phases, win condition, fail condition, acceptance criteria. Constraints: only one town/tavern map + one sewer map, no ship/forest/dragon/market chapters, no complex inventory, no branched dialogue sim, no global quest sim, map-local triggers only.

Create docs/BARK_TRIGGER_TABLE.md with: Technical mapping table. Columns: Bark Key, Character, Audio Text, Bark Type, Trigger Scope, Effect, Quest Pressure Change, Cooldown, Safe/Failsafe Behavior, Used In Slice?. Bark Types: SAFE_BARK, TRIGGER_BARK, PRESSURE_BARK, UTILITY_BARK, DANGER_BARK. All bark keys as stable enum keys (e.g. NIB_SMELL_TREASURE, BRUGG_ATTACK, VELLUM_CALLS_FOR_FLAME). Every trigger needs scope, cooldown, and failsafe. No bark may change global world logic uncontrolled.

Design rule to embed in all docs: The Questbook is not a random generator. It is always understandably wrong. Humor comes from consistent, bureaucratic misinterpretation, not from random things happening.
acceptance_criteria: docs/GAME_CONCEPT_LOCK.md exists and is under 1200 words
docs/VERTICAL_SLICE.md exists with all 7 sections and all required content categories
docs/BARK_TRIGGER_TABLE.md exists with proper table format and all required columns
All bark keys use stable UPPER_CASE_ENUM format
No new chapters, characters, or lore are invented
Documents are in German/English mix as appropriate to the game concept
No marketing language, no roadmap beyond the slice
verification: Run: ls /projects/sandbox/GAIME/docs/ -- should show GAME_CONCEPT_LOCK.md, VERTICAL_SLICE.md, BARK_TRIGGER_TABLE.md
Run: wc -w /projects/sandbox/GAIME/docs/GAME_CONCEPT_LOCK.md -- should be under 1200 words
Run: grep -c 'NIB_\|BRUGG_\|VELLUM_' /projects/sandbox/GAIME/docs/BARK_TRIGGER_TABLE.md -- should show multiple enum keys
findings: All three GDD documents created successfully. GAME_CONCEPT_LOCK.md is 659 words (under 1200 limit). BARK_TRIGGER_TABLE.md contains 20 barks covering all three characters and all five bark types. VERTICAL_SLICE.md covers all 7 required sections with full asset lists. Documents are docs-only so no build verification needed. Committed on feat/mvp1-kmp-foundation branch.
